creator: dburr@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Imported with a few minor changes, thanks! 
* Restructured the Makefile to more resemble ports/print/psutils -- this is 
how ports that have multiple possible configurations should be done. 
* Made HTML the default format, because it is the smallest and most anyone 
has access to some sort of HTML viewer. 
* Deleted "/usr/X11R6/share/doc/gimp" (a directory) from PLIST_HTML -- it 
was causing spurious messages from pkg_delete. 

Thanks again!  A manual for GIMP is definitely a nice thing to have 
in ports!
